creator: quentin.thebault@defenso.fr
text:
Hello,

When issuing a `poweroff` command on this system, it halts, screen display goes off, but the power button LED is still glowing, and the fan is still running.

There are no error messages on screen before it goes black. Just successfull closing messages from GELI (encrypted disk setup).

`reboot` seems to be hit-and-miss. Works sometimes but not always.

Workarounds tried, to no avail:
- hw.efi.poweroff=0
- hw.acpi.disable_on_poweroff=0
